member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.CancellationChangeToken.RegisterChangeCallback(System.Action{System.Object},System.Object)
member.summary: Registers for a callback that will be invoked when the entry has changed. must be set before the callback is invoked.
member.param: State to be passed into the callback.
member.returns: An that is used to unregister the callback.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.CancellationChangeToken.ActiveChangeCallbacks
member.summary: Indicates if this token will pro-actively raise callbacks. If , the token consumer must poll to detect changes.
member.returns: if the token will proactively raise callbacks; otherwise.

member.returns: if a change has occured; otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.Compare(Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment,Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Compares substrings of two specified objects using the specified rules, and returns an integer that indicates their relative position in the sort order.
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the rules for the comparison.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer indicating the lexical relationship between the two comparands. The value is negative if is less than , 0 if the two comparands are equal, and positive if is greater than . .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.EndsWith(System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks if the end of this matches the specified when compared using the specified .
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the rules to use in the comparison.
member.returns: if matches the end of this ; otherwise, .

member.param: An object to compare with this object.
member.returns: if the current object is equal to the other parameter; otherwise, .

member.summary: Determines whether two specified objects have the same value. A parameter specifies the culture, case, and sort rules used in the comparison.
member.param: One of the enumeration values that specifies the rules for the comparison.
member.returns: if the objects are equal; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOf(System.Char)
member.summary: Gets the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the character in this .
member.returns: The zero-based index position of from the beginning of the if that character is found, or -1 if it is not.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOf(System.Char,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the character in this . The search starts at .
member.param: The zero-based index position at which the search starts.
member.exception: is greater than or equal to or less than zero.
member.returns: The zero-based index position of from the beginning of the if that character is found, or -1 if it is not.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOf(System.Char,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the zero-based index of the first occurrence of the character in this . The search starts at and examines a specified number of character positions.
member.param: The zero-based index position at which the search starts.
The number of characters to examine.
member.exception: or is less than zero, or + is greater than .
member.returns: The zero-based index position of from the beginning of the if that character is found, or -1 if it is not.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOfAny(System.Char[])
member.summary: Reports the zero-based index of the first occurrence in this instance of any character in a specified array of Unicode characters.
member.param: A Unicode character array containing one or more characters to seek.
member.returns: The zero-based index position of the first occurrence in this instance where any character in was found; -1 if no character in was found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOfAny(System.Char[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Reports the zero-based index of the first occurrence in this instance of any character in a specified array of Unicode characters. The search starts at a specified character position.
member.param: A Unicode character array containing one or more characters to seek.
member.exception: is greater than or equal to or less than zero.
member.returns: The zero-based index position of the first occurrence in this instance where any character in was found; -1 if no character in was found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringSegment.IndexOfAny(System.Char[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reports the zero-based index of the first occurrence in this instance of any character in a specified array of Unicode characters. The search starts at a specified character position and examines a specified number of character positions.
member.param: A Unicode character array containing one or more characters to seek.
The number of character positions to examine.
member.exception: or is less than zero, or + is greater than .
member.returns: The zero-based index position of the first occurrence in this instance where any character in was found; -1 if no character in was found.

member.summary: Indicates whether the specified is null or an Empty string.

member.summary: Reports the zero-based index position of the last occurrence of a specified Unicode character within this instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringTokenizer.Enumerator.MoveNext
member.summary: Advances the enumerator to the next element of the collection.
member.returns: if the enumerator was successfully advanced to the next element; if the enumerator has passed the end of the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringTokenizer.Enumerator.Reset
member.summary: Sets the enumerator to its initial position, which is before the first element in the collection.

member.returns: if was successfully removed from the collection; otherwise, . This method also returns if is not found in the original collection.

member.returns: An enumerator that can be used to iterate through the collection.

member.summary: Returns the zero-based index of the first occurrence of an item in the .
member.param: The string to locate in the .
member.returns: the zero-based index of the first occurrence of within the , if found; otherwise, –1.

member.summary: Inserts an item to the at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index at which should be inserted.
The object to insert into the .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.System#Collections#Generic#IList{System#String}#RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the item at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the item to remove.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.System#Collections#IEnumerable#GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through a collection.
member.returns: An object that can be used to iterate through the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.ToArray
member.summary: Creates a string array from the current object.
member.returns: A string array represented by this instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.ToString
member.summary: Converts the value of the current object to its equivalent string representation, with multiple values joined as a comma separated string.
member.returns: A string representation of the value of the current object.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of string elements contained in this .
member.returns: The number of string elements contained in this .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the string at index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to get.
member.returns: The string at the specified index.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the collection is read-only.

member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.Enumerator.MoveNext
member.summary: Advances the enumerator to the next element of the collection.
member.returns: if the enumerator was successfully advanced to the next element; if the enumerator has passed the end of the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.Enumerator.System#Collections#IEnumerator#Reset
member.summary: Sets the enumerator to its initial position, which is before the first element in the collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.StringValues.Enumerator.Current
member.summary: Gets the element in the collection at the current position of the enumerator.
member.returns: The element in the collection at the current position of the enumerator.
